text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While we're training in preparation for the
Hopeful Stakes...
choice_data_list: In the Hopeful, you have to go uphill twice.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uphill...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Hopeful Stakes is a 2,000-meter turf race
held at Nakayama Racecourse. The starting line is
on a straight right before a slope.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Runners have to climb the same slope twice, right
after the start and just before the finish, a
challenge for inexperienced junior racers.
choice_data_list: On the first pass, try to really get a feel for it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She'll have a better chance if she focuses on the
second pass, during her last spurt, rather than the
initial jostling for position.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Get a feel for it...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uh, meaning what, exactly?
choice_data_list:
Get a feel for your stride as you climb the
slope.

Get a feel for your stride as you climb the
slope.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: My stride?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've come up with a strategy for the Hopeful
Stakes, but I'm having trouble explaining it
clearly.
choice_data_list: Which part are you getting hung up on?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Which part? Uhh...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Like... all of it?
choice_data_list: I see...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm just, you know... not, like, great with
strategies...
choice_data_list:
You understand that you're going up the same
hill twice, yes?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Yeah, I get that much. I might be dumb, but I'm not that dumb.
choice_data_list:
Okay, so what if I said to treat the first pass as a
test run?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: A test run?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take her to a riverside slope to show her what I
mean.
choice_data_list:
Try to tackle the slope with a longer stride than
usual.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uhh, sure, I guess...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Well?
choice_data_list: Next, try tightening it up, with a ta-ta-ta-ta rhythm.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, come on. You should've warned me I was
gonna have to do it twice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her complaining, Tosen Jordan makes a
spirited dash up the hill.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...It felt easier than the first time, I think?
choice_data_list: It's easier to go uphill with a shorter stride.
It's easier to go uphill with a shorter stride.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, yeah? Huh.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks surprised, but she already does it
unconsciously on the training course.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's just that on unfamiliar terrain, like this slope
by the river, she has no way of knowing how to
adjust her stride beforehand.
choice_data_list: I think the actual race will be the same.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Because the hill at Nakayama and the one at
school are different?
choice_data_list: Exactly. And that's why you need a test run!
Exactly. And that's why you need a test run!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Different inclines require different strides. The
only way to figure out the best approach is to
actually run it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Hopeful Stakes is here.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So the first time up the slope is the test run.
That's where I figure out the best way to run up.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Then, when I go up the second time—when it
really counts—I book it! That about right?
choice_data_list: Exactly!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Got it! That's what I'll do!
choice_data_list: You seem pretty into it.
You seem pretty into it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Of course. I've gotta take first if I wanna make it
big.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, the Classic Triple Crown is a must, which
means I've gotta deal with the Satsuki next, you
know?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...What?
choice_data_list: You've already decided your next goal!
You've already decided your next goal!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Geez, what are you shouting for? Trying to blow
my ears out or something?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As far as I knew, she never had any goal besides
"making it big."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For her to name the Classic Triple Crown
specifically like that, she must have been doing
some research.
choice_data_list: Looks like you've been studying.
Looks like you've been studying.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Ahhh!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Whatever! First things first, I have the Hopeful to
win, so see ya!
